description: A dispatcher for terminal tractors (ITVs) must efficiently assign jobs to move containers from the ship to the yard.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the queue of containers being discharged by the quay cranes.

expected_outcome.expected: Dispatcher sees a queue of containers waiting for pickup at the quayside.

nodes.task_description: Identify available terminal tractors and their current locations.

expected_outcome.expected: Dispatcher sees three available tractors near the vessel.

nodes.task_description: Assign the next container move to the closest available tractor.

expected_outcome.expected: The system sends a job ticket to the tractor driver's terminal, instructing them which container to pick up and where to take it.
